human_verification.notes: Verified A/E-specific boundary behavior, research-source coverage, revision truth-set controls, hold/release gates, and scenario-to-ability mappings.

review_notes: All 12 scenarios pass with explicit release-hold, escalation, refusal, and tenant-adaptation behavior.
Required abilities across shared, workflow-phase, and cross-industry profile are fully covered and mapped.

specialist_owned_evidence: Evidence-driven issue-state, hold, and release gate logic is explicit for drawing, specification, model, and transmittal packages.
Licensed signoff, code, security, and adjacent BIM/design authority boundaries are explicit and route to the correct owners.
Conflict handling elevates owner-standard, tenant-policy, and revision-truth-set contradictions instead of over-resolving them.
Runtime remains `specification-based`, with no retained-implementation claim embedded in this package.
notes: No blocking unresolved ambiguity remains because jurisdictional and owner-specific variation is converted into explicit retrieval and escalation requirements.
Pack is ready for validated specification-based deployment with clear promotion criteria for a future retained-implementation package.
